review_title: GitGuardian has always had my back.
author: Amith G.
pros: The timely response after I do something wrong in my commit such as exposing the authentication keys or any other secure information. The app is very easy to use, moreover can be used even without us being aware that it is working in the back. The integration and implementation was as easy as logging in with my github credentials. I use it all the time or better, I do not even know it is being used all the time. Cannot comment on the swiftness of the customer support as I have not had to contact the support till now.
cons: The UI is not up to the mark, my friends and colleagues find it a bit confusing with all the icons and symbols in the UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Fit to purpose to our needs / Very little I need to admin
description: GitGuardian is now actively included in our core CI/CD pipeline. Setup was very easy and, and the time I need now to admin it is close to zero. After the initial adoption, "avoiding secrets in first instance" is now part of our standard practice. I would say GitGuardian is now our insurance that secrets are not disclosed inadvertently.
author: Fabio C.
pros: Easy to install. I mean, very easy! I have followed the "Quick-Start" guide, it took me about 30 mins. and when I read "Start Remediating" I thought it was the time to figure out how to adapt to our own environment and I have spent a couple of hours to set-up a manual/parallel integration that was totally unnecessary. I like the remediation flow: no emails back and forth, it simplifies the communication and the resolution of incidents across users. I can easily narrow the scope to what is critical to us, this has reduced the remediation effort to specific and relevant incidents. Automatic notifications: as an admin, I do not need to investigate every and each incident. GitHub Integration: secrets within code are automaticall detected and merge is blocked.
cons: So many ways to integrate, it might be a plus for others, it was confusing to me. in my case I was not clear if I needed a "VCS/GitHub" or "CI/CD GitHub Actions" integration. Pricing plan for small business is not fully clear and requires to "contact sales".
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use for GitHub, not so easy for ADO.
author: Chris C.
pros: Very easy to setup, simply a few clicks and you're done. Quickly alerts in near real time.
cons: No support for integrating with ADO, which is frustrating because we've had to purchase another tool for this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Great application. Highly recommended to have enabled on anyone's repository.
author: Aman K.
pros: Ability to work on private repo. Standard interface to easily see who comitted and to assign resolution to a user. The teams feature is greate and seemless. It emails on time about the vulnerability.
cons: I cannot find the button to auto patch and add new commit option
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Keep your codes and software safe with GitGuardian
description: Software that monitors my code for security purposes!! What more as a developer would i need than some software which can alert me in case of any security issues with my code!
author: Isalanya M.
pros: First of all a really great UI. Very simple and beautiful dashboard.The emails which keep me notified in case of any confidential credentials i may leak in my codes keep my codes and software safe and also help me realize where the leak is.
cons: I haven't really found any negative sides while using GitGuardian, it has really been a useful software and can't complain about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: First impression of working with GitGuardian
description: My overall experience with GitGuardian has been very positive. I've used their platform to scan my repositories for secrets and vulnerabilities, personally, I had no problem setting it up the first time. GitGuardian has helped me improve my security practices and protect my code from unauthorized access.
author: Yegor V.
pros: I enjoyed using GitGuardian. It helped me protect my code from leaking sensitive data and secrets. This product is perfect for small businesses with up to 25 people and for individual use. The features that I found most helpful were the automatic scanning of commits and the alerts for potential breaches. The product was very easy to use and integrated well with my GitHub account and workflow. I would recommend GitGuardian to anyone who wants to secure their code and prevent data leaks.
cons: As for the missing features, I think more detailed management of which repositories and files are tracked would be helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gitguardian prevented a major leak in my codebase
description: as i said, gitgauardian helped detect a leak in my codebase and emailed to notify me about it, else i would have found it pretty late.
author: Abhishek N.
pros: It detected the leak pretty quick and gave me some steps which put me mentally at ease that my data was safe.
cons: I think they can make there UI a little more user friendly as it is sometimes a little hard to navigate what leaks it detected and where its telling me to fix it, especially while im panicking.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: GitGuardian emerges as a highly effective tool when it comes to identifying potential password leaks within GitHub commits. Its proficiency in this regard has proven invaluable, as it has brought to my attention several errors in my commits that I might not have noticed otherwise. By doing so, GitGuardian has played a pivotal role in preventing potentially severe security breaches.
author: Giovani B.
pros: Pretty efficient in detecting possible password leaks on GitHub commits. If it wasn't for GitGuardian's notification, I would not have realized several mistakes I've commited, and it could have led to a severe security breachs.
cons: So far I haven't faced any problems that would fit in "dislike" about GitGuardian.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Never lets you escape any critical data
author: Álvaro C.
pros: The immediate notice of critical exposed data and good resolution options.
cons: At the moment I do not dislike anything. It was usefull and not very difficult to understand how to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: GitGuradian Helps me find the Repos.
description: I like GitGuradian, although I frequently use it in a week
author: Aman R.
pros: Finding a repo which is urgently needed to me It makes easy for me.
cons: It is a little bit more expensive as compared.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The platform at the height of our needs
author: joel L.
pros: Gitguardian is the response to our expectations, since he answered all our preoccupations, both in terms of monitoring and at risk alert
cons: This platform is really perfect for our cost structure, and in terms of features that's all we needed
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I like the experience so far, would love to use it more in the future
author: Akash M.
pros: It is very important for developers those are not especially good at keeping those secrets safe.
cons: More Friendlier UI, for easy management of things.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm new to GitGuardian and a CS student in college. That being said, I'm prone to accidentally commenting security keys in code and forgetting to delete them before commit. The GitGuardian tool has been assisting me in ensuring my recent project applications are not exposed and the easy integration is a big plus.
author: John J.
pros: Git Secret Detection and Incident report.
cons: None I can think of yet. But with time there will be additional features that can help ensure optimal security during development. Like some sort of integration in VS Code itself.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Shreyasi M.
pros: The product is easy to use and easily integrable. I love how it alerts me when I have secrets exposed.
cons: I didn't explore much but I like everything till now ... :)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Una herramienta fantástica para mantener nuestro código seguro con GitGuardian
description: Me encanta usar GitGuardian porque me permite comprender fácilmente si alguno de mis repositorios ha filtrado información crítica por error. Además de eso, me ayuda a monitorear las dependencias para comprender si algo asociado con mi proyecto está fallando. Además, GitGuardian proporciona alertas en tiempo real, lo que garantiza que esté al tanto de inmediato de cualquier vulnerabilidad de seguridad o secreto expuesto. Esta herramienta es invaluable para mantener la integridad y seguridad de mis proyectos. También ofrece información sobre el estado de mi código base, lo que permite tomar medidas proactivas contra riesgos potenciales.
author: Eduardo Andrés H.
pros: Nuestra selección de GitGuardian Public Monitoring fue impulsada por su enfoque incomparable en detectar y mitigar los riesgos asociados con la exposición accidental de información confidencial en repositorios públicos.
cons: Falsos positivos asociados a repositorios que podrían no ser tan críticos.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: My overall experience has been great with GitGuardian except for the payment plan part where it definitely needs rework.
author: Rahul L.
pros: I have been using GitGuardian for my college Project. First and foremost UX is really good and intuitive. My project is around security so I am aware of the necessity of that and GitGuardian is an appropriate alternative to other open source products. I faced a problem initally and i found enough support to help me around.
cons: They could work on a more refined payment plan. This will give more flexibity to all category of developers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We are using GitGuardian to prevent secrets from leaking into repositories both public and private. So far our experience has been excellent. We actually leaked a private SSH key and got a notification from GitGuardian almost immediately. We were able to revoke the key and remediate the blunder.
author: Torgny B.
pros: Integration was a snap. We're already using pre-commit for most of our repos so hooking GitGuardian into the process was simple. Since we also already use GitHub, we found integration to be extremely easy.
cons: We had no issues integrating GitGuardian and have not found any cons, yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: as said in the pros, guardian has been good for us in saving tokens and encryption tokens. we actually have an attendance portal. where we put up decryption codes on front end and this was secured using gitguardian. Apart from that, it also protected the token at backend.
author: Ansh B.
pros: It has helped us in saving tokens and encryption tokens from becoming vulnerable. This has allowed us to get good cybersecurity. it was easy to use because of integration with Git Hub. we have been using it for 6 months and it has saved us quite some time
cons: Everything has been good except the payment plan, apart from that everything else has been smooth for us. The integration has been easy as it part of GitHub but the payment part has been quite expensive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lapio U.
pros: It is a great threat response solution and comes cybersecurity solution
cons: GitGuardian - has been super helpful. No issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: It has been great I trust it and the securities of my repos
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is pretty important to maintain the security of repos. I did not even aware of these until gitGuardian took place in my development.

author: Phani S.

description: I have successfully traced and deleted compromised secrets and managed my repositories better using GitGuardian.
author: Senamela M.
pros: I have solved a lot of security issues with GitGuardian, from compromised API Keys, to secrets that were staged, it's a life saver.
cons: Not much to fault, it's a life saver. I don't know what I would do without it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Feel confident that your developers arn't commiting secrets.
description: Very positive, I feel more confident now that secrets wont be in git long if they are committed at all. I can trust if I haven't gotten an alert that there are no secrets.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the timely notifications when there is an alert, and the triage for dealing with them are quick and easily understood by users.
cons: Integration with github more to create issues and pull requests to remove secrets would be nice.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best feature of GitGuardian is its ability to find secrets based not on regex patterns, but on string entropy -- that allows you to locate things like database passwords that don't follow a particular pattern. GHAS (GitHub's native security toolkit) doesn't allow that.
cons: I can't think of anything major. Billing model took me some time to understand.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: GitGuardian helps me protect my repo and gives steps to remediate the security problems identified
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The email security notifications I receive
cons: The UI/UX could be improved upon. Perhaps a change of theme.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
